null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: OMMCOM News, citing IMD: Bhubaneswar's coldest November night in 25 years (12.9°C) on Nov 16, 2025, IMD Yellow Warning for Khurda, cold conditions through Nov 18. ERA5 cell 14.6-15.0°C; station-vs-cell gap ~2°C.
